creator: marcel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 160511
Loader with 'gop' and 'uga' commands

I have a new loader that besides the 'gop' command also has the 'uga' command. Can you try running 'uga' and report back. I tested this in VMware Fusion 8 and VirtualBox 5. The former has UGA, the latter has not.
